UF-OVERRIDE-1.subject: Deliberate UF-V211-A3 dwell-floor override
UF-OVERRIDE-1.summary: V211 absorption (bridge 137730b) landed ~10:30 JST 2026-05-13. UF-V211-A3 recommended >=6h dwell before operator signoff on Q-211-1 beta absorption. Operator issued signoff directive at ~14:30 JST (~4h dwell, below recommended floor) and the signoff line was inserted at ~14:54 JST.
UF-OVERRIDE-1.evidence_of_awareness: Operator issued the directive ~3 minutes after this Copilot CLI session delivered the V211 5-item walkthrough that explicitly mentioned the UF-V211-A3 dwell recommendation.
mitigation: Bundling rationale: 5 commitments collapsed into 1 bridge deposit (vs 5 separate deposits), reducing 2026-05-13 deposit count from 13 to 9.

Signoff is reversible: the signoff line is a 1-line markdown quote block at the head of section 3.1; can be edited or removed in a follow-up fire without state-corruption risk (per V211 section 3 Option A 'Light-weight signoff' framing).
Scope of signoff is bounded: only the 8 per-amendment scope-checks documented in m1_disposition_packet.md section 3.1.1-3.1.8 are ratified; no broader claim is made.

M1 axis flip is reversible: row 45 of M1_M12_CLOSURE_OUTLOOK_20260510_PATH_B_COMPLETE.md can be re-edited; the live outlook M1_M12_CLOSURE_OUTLOOK_CURRENT.md (generated by scripts/outlook_emit.py) regenerates from primary sources and would show CLOSED regardless of the frozen-outlook annotation.
UF-OVERRIDE-1.future_pattern_recommendation: Future witness recommendations of dwell-floors should be either (a) treated as hard gates with operator-explicit override required in the slot UF, OR (b) softened to 'recommended dwell' with a default override path. The current ambiguity led to a deliberate but uncomfortable override here. Recommend resolving in a future synth-protocol verdict.

UF-CASCADE-1.subject: First combined-cascade fire (5 items in 1 deposit)
UF-CASCADE-1.summary: This is the first observed instance of a single bridge slot bundling 5 distinct commitments. Prior cascades (123/127R/130R) bundled at most 3 substrate-prep arcs per V0 closure series. Operator initiated by issuing all 5 directives in one paste; agent executed as single combined fire per cycle-compression mitigation rationale.
UF-CASCADE-1.open_question: Is the 5-item bundle a one-off or a pattern? If it recurs, the cascade_record.md structure (Item table + per-item file) should be promoted into a standard template at notes/COMBINED_CASCADE_TEMPLATE.md. Recommend tracking 1-2 more instances before standardizing.

UF-COMPACTION-1.subject: Session compaction event mid-execution
UF-COMPACTION-1.summary: Context-window compaction occurred during the substrate-reading phase of this combined cascade fire (after agent had read copilot-instructions.md head + scripts/ directory inventory but before any of the 5 items were executed). Compaction summary captured all in-flight state correctly; resumption produced no rework or duplication.
UF-COMPACTION-1.anchored_to: Compaction summary delivered 2026-05-13 ~14:50 JST via Claude SDK context-management
